title: Moving current date to previous date
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am trying to create an automation or formula that will move all the dates in column A to column B after a predesignated amount of time has passed. 
Has anyone had any success in doing something similar?

posts.author: Mdenciger (miriam@projectextreme.org)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am trying to create an automation or formula that will move all the dates in column A to column B after a predesignated amount of time has passed.
Has anyone had any success in doing something similar?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mdenciger

Welcome to the Community!

You should be able to achieve this but will need the help of something like Column Magic (search the app marketplace - it has a free account you can work with).

It enables you to copy the value in a column (including mirror columns) and paste it into another/more suitable column. You run supporting native automation to clear column A afterwards if desired.

Let me know if you get stuck - I’m happy to chat all things monday.com anytime.
